section: UNITED STATES HOUSE OF REPRESENTATIVES - Periodic Transaction Report
free_text:
**UNITED STATES HOUSE OF REPRESENTATIVES - Periodic Transaction Report**

- **NAME:** Rohit Khanna
- **OFFICE TELEPHONE:** 202-225-2631
- [X] Member of the U.S. House of Representatives - State: CA, District: 17
- [ ] Officer or Employee - Employing Office blank
- Did you purchase any shares that were allocated as a part of an Initial Public Offering? [ ] Yes  [X] No
- Initial report checked; amendment unchecked.
- Date of Report Being Amended: blank.
- Received stamp/marking: HAND DELIVERED / Legislative Resource Center / Office of the Clerk, 2026 APR -7 PM.

Transaction grid contains the printed example row and no real transaction rows; actual transactions follow on attached pages.

uncertainties.note: Rotated OCR and scan show APR -7 PM; minute is not clearly legible.
